title: carpunya oblongata
intro: Carpunya oblongata, also known as Caralluma oblongata, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic effects. The health benefits of Carpunya oblongata include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and reduce blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Carpunya oblongata include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
